diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and type definitions from index level
+- Internal names noticed: Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports the Hono class and all public type interfaces for convenience
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class and types from types.ts, context.ts, request.ts, and client modules; provides single import location for all public API surface
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Core type definitions for handlers, middleware, routes, and environment
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, Router, RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions defining handlers, middleware, routes, schemas, and environment types for the entire Hono framework
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines all TypeScript interfaces for Handler, MiddlewareHandler, HandlerInterface with overload signatures, RouterRoute, Env types, and validation target types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting optional configuration
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Top-level exported class that extends HonoBase and provides SmartRouter by default
+- Copy-safe detail: Extends HonoBase class, initializes with SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks, accepts router option for customization
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Base Hono class with get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, Context, Router, FetchEventLike, Env, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, getPath, mergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Foundation class implementing routing, handler composition, request handling via fetch entry point, and middleware support with base method definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: 545-line core implementation with constructor setting up route registration, #dispatch handling requests, #addRoute managing router entries, errorHandlers, notFoundHandler, route and basePath composition methods, mount for sub-apps, and fire for service worker
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, event, executionCtx, res, set, get, var, header, status, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render, setLayout, getLayout
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, Data, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, ResponseOrInit, TEXT_PLAIN
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request-scoped context class holding environment bindings, request state, response object, headers, and providing helpers to create typed responses and access variables
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines managing #rawRequest, #var Map, #status, #executionCtx, #res, finalized flag, header/set/get operations, body/text/json/html/response methods with type safety, custom renderer and layout support, error handling integration
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, param, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, ValidationTargets, Input, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, Body, BodyCache, simplify, UnionToIntersection, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class providing typed access to URL, method, path params, query params, headers, and body content with caching and validation support
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines implementing #validatedData Map, #matchResult for routing, bodyCache for repeated body access, param/query/header methods, parseBody for form/urlencoded data, json/text/arrayBuffer/blob/formData via #cachedBody, cloneRawRequest utility
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: Symbol for match result access
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Single file exporting unique symbol for internal request match result access
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line defining GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol used by HonoRequest for exposing matchResult without breaking encapsulation
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticing: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utilities supporting multipart/form-data, application/x-www-form-urlencoded with all/dot options for array and nested object parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines implementing parseBody async function detecting content type, parseFormData for formdata, convertFormDataToBodyData with all/dot options, handleParsingAllValues for arrays, handleParsingNestedValues for dot-notation objects
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function based on koa-compose pattern for chaining handlers with error and not-found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines implementing dispatch function tracking index, wrapping handlers in try/catch for error propagation, calling next via dispatch(i+1), setting context.error on failures, returning composed middleware accepting Context and Next
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class with res, status properties and getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for throwing with controlled status codes and optional responses, used for authentication failures and fatal errors
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines extending Error with readonly res and status properties, constructor accepting status and options, getResponse returning provided response or creating new Response from message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Client, Fetch, PickResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module exporting hc shortcut function and response parsing utilities with type inference for typed API requests
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines re-exporting hc from client.ts, parseResponse and DetailedError from utils, and type aliases from types.ts for client API types
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function creating proxied clients
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, BuildSearchParamsFn, URLSearchParams, FormData, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, buildSearchParams, webSocket, Proxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Creates proxy-based HTTP client using createProxy for method chaining, ClientRequestImpl for fetch execution, supports query params, form data, JSON, paths, and web sockets
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines with createProxy for method interception, ClientRequestImpl with url/method/searchParams/rBody/cType, hc main function building proxy callback, handling $methods, $url, $path, $ws, deepMerge for options, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlParam
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, TypedURL, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Client
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequest, HonoRequest, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client module type definitions including Schema type extensions, typed URL construction, request/response inference, client request options, and protocol transformation types
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines defining ClientRequestImpl types, ClientResponse interface with body/json/text/blob/redirect methods, Client type via PathToChain recursive type, TypedURL extending URL, BuildPath/BuildPathname helpers, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, HasRequiredKeys checks
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, detailedError, fetchRP, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, ClientResponse, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utilities for URL manipulation with mergePath, param replacement, search params, protocol swaps, deep merge, and parseResponse for type inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines with mergePath removing trailing/leading slashes, replaceUrlParam regex substitution, buildSearchParams for query params, replaceUrlProtocol for ws/http swappng, removeIndexString cleanup, deepMerge for object merging, parseResponse delegating to fetchRP
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex, Response, Headers, contentType
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch result parser detecting response type, caching parsed body for reuse, throwing DetailedError on non-OK responses with structured error info
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines based on ofetch, nullBodyResponses set for 101/204/205/304 status codes, fetchRP function awaiting response, detecting content-type header, caching _data via responseType detection, DetailedError extending Error with detail/code/log/statusCode properties, detectResponseType using jsonRegex
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function, handle function
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions, addEventListener
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker adapter registering Hono app with fetch event listener for Cloudflare Workers module workers style deployment
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines const fire function adding fetch event listener via handle, type parameterized for Env Schema BasePath, @ts-expect-error for TypeScript addEventListener typing issue, re-exports handle and fire as adapter entry points
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, typeof fetch, globalThis
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types
+- Plain-English schema: Handler for Service Worker fetch event wrapping app.fetch, handling 404 fallback to custom fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines type Handler function for FetchEvent, HandleOptions with optional fetch override, handle function binding fetch to globalThis, returning handler invoking evt.respondWith, async app.fetch with empty bindings, 404 fallback to opts.fetch, returning response
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, Event, waitUntil, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for Service Worker FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines defining FetchEvent interface with clientId, handled promise, preloadResponse, request property, resultingClientId, respondWith method, ExtendableEvent with waitUntil for keeping tasks alive
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
